title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLIV. Games.
content:
I can make diet bread,
            Thick and thin;
        I can make diet bread,
            Fit for the king.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLIV. Games.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
